title: NOC 40011 – Government Managers – Economic Analysis, Policy Development, and Program Administration | GTR Immigration
description: Government Managers – Economic Analysis, Policy Development, and Program Administration under NOC 40011 are senior-level leaders responsible for shaping fiscal, trade, taxation, energy, and economic growth strategies in Canada. As Canada continues strengthening economic resilience, trade expansion, and industrial development, experienced economic policy managers remain in consistent demand under this TEER 0 management occupation. For qualified professionals, NOC 40011 offers strong eligibility under Express Entry and Provincial Nominee Programs aligned with public sector leadership roles.

classification.teer: Classification LevelDetailsBroad Occupation Category4 – Occupations in education, law, and social, community, and government servicesTEER0 – Management occupationsMajor Group40 – Managers in public administration, in education and social and community services, and in public protection servicesSub-Major Group400 – Managers in public administration, in education and social and community services and in public protection servicesMinor Group4001 – Managers in public administrationNOC Code40011

common_job_titles: Economic policy analysis director – government services
Energy market analysis director – government services
Excise tax programs director – government services
International trade policy manager – government services
duties: Government Managers in Economic Analysis and Policy perform some or all of the following:
Plan, organize, direct, and evaluate economic research projects
Develop and advise on departmental economic policies
Manage taxation, trade, labor, transportation, or agriculture policy initiatives
Plan and control research and operational budgets
employment_requirements: Bachelor’s degree in economics, commerce, business administration, or public administration
Master’s degree in economics or related field may be required
Several years of experience as an economist, economic development officer, or socio-economic researcher
Senior public service roles may require security clearance
Bilingual proficiency (English and French) may be required for federal roles
Extensive managerial experience and policy leadership are key selection factors.
salary_prospects: Annual earnings typically range from $64,900 to $148,000, depending on jurisdiction and seniority.
job_outlook: The outlook for NOC 40011 is stable, supported by:
Economic recovery and fiscal planning initiatives
Advanced degrees and strategic leadership experience improve competitiveness.
labour_market_demand: Government Managers in Economic Policy are employed across:
Strong employment opportunities exist in provinces such as Ontario, Alberta, British Columbia, Quebec, Manitoba, and northern jurisdictions like Nunavut and Northwest Territories.
Why Immigrate to Canada Under NOC 40011?
Leadership roles in national economic development
Professionals with expertise in trade, taxation, or economic modeling are particularly competitive.

Contact GTR Immigration today to begin your pathway toward permanent residence in Canada as a Government Manager – Economic Analysis, Policy Development, and Program Administration.
